chapter_title.en: Chapter 82 – The abhorrence of the timing (of the re-appearance of Imam Al Mahdi<sup>asws</sup>)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/175)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/175)
text: قَالَ أَبَى اللَّهُ إِلَّا أَنْ يُخَالِفَ وَقْتَ الْمُوَقِّتِينَ .

en.hubeali: ‘He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Refused except that He<sup>azwj</sup> would be Opposing the timing of the timers’.
en.sarwar: 4. Ahmad has narrated through his chain of narrators from the Imam (a.s.) the following. “Allah disdains to make the people’s time set for it (reappearance of the one who will rise with Divine Authority) to come true.”
